meta.title: Water Leak Detection Atlanta, GA | Fast & Non-Invasive
meta.description: Professional water leak detection in Atlanta — non-invasive acoustic and thermal imaging technology locates hidden water leaks fast, without damaging your home.

hero.heading: Water Leak Detection in Atlanta, GA

image.alt: Plumber using acoustic equipment to detect water leak in an Atlanta home

intro.heading: Find Hidden Water Leaks Before They Cause Damage
paragraphs: A small water leak can quietly drive up your bill and rot framing, drywall, and flooring long before you see a wet spot. Our Atlanta specialists use non-invasive acoustic listening, thermal imaging, and pressure testing to locate leaks in supply lines, drains, and concealed plumbing without unnecessary demolition.
Once we pinpoint the source, you get a clear report with the leak location, severity, and recommended repair scope so you can move quickly with your plumber or restoration contractor.

image.alt: Thermal imaging camera locating hidden water leak behind a wall

benefits.heading: Why Choose Our Water Leak Detection Service

items.title: Non-Invasive Diagnostics
items.description: Acoustic listening, thermal imaging, and tracer gas tools find leaks without ripping out walls, floors, or landscaping.

items.title: Fast Response
items.description: Same-day and next-day appointments across the Atlanta metro for urgent leaks affecting water bills or property damage.

items.title: Clear Findings Report
items.description: Every inspection ends with a written report: exact leak location, type, and the repair scope your plumber needs.

items.title: Residential & Commercial
items.description: From single-family homes to multi-tenant buildings and restaurants, our team handles supply, drain, and underground line leaks.

items.title: Licensed & Insured
items.description: All work is performed by licensed leak detection specialists carrying full liability and workers' compensation insurance.

items.title: Save On Water Bills
items.description: Catching a hidden leak early stops thousands of gallons per month of waste and prevents structural and mold damage downstream.

process.heading: Our Water Leak Detection Process
process.intro: A simple, transparent process that locates leaks fast and leaves your property intact.

steps.title: 1. Call or Book Online
steps.description: Tell us what you are seeing — high bills, damp spots, low pressure, or a meter that will not stop — and we schedule an inspection that fits your day.

steps.title: 2. On-Site Inspection
steps.description: A specialist arrives with acoustic, thermal, and pressure-testing equipment and isolates the affected system before locating the leak.

steps.title: 3. Pinpoint the Leak
steps.description: We mark the exact leak location on the wall, floor, slab, or yard so any repair only opens up the minimum needed area.

steps.title: 4. Written Report
steps.description: You receive a clear findings report you can hand to your plumber, insurance adjuster, or property manager to move into repair quickly.

items.question: How do I know I have a hidden water leak?
items.answer: Common signs include an unexplained jump in your water bill, the water meter moving with all fixtures off, damp spots on walls or ceilings, warm areas on a slab floor, low water pressure, or the sound of running water when nothing is on.

items.question: Will you damage my walls or floors to find the leak?
items.answer: No. We use non-invasive tools first — acoustic listening, thermal imaging, and pressure testing — so most inspections require no demolition. If a small access opening is ever needed, you approve it before we proceed.

items.question: Do you repair the leak as well?
items.answer: Our specialty is finding leaks. We deliver a written report so you or your plumber can perform the repair quickly and accurately, often with a much smaller repair footprint than guesswork allows.

items.question: How fast can you come out?
items.answer: Same-day and next-day appointments are usually available across the Atlanta metro. Call (404) 555-0199 to confirm the earliest open slot for your address.

siteFooter.tagline: Professional leak detection services for residential and commercial properties throughout Atlanta, GA.
